TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Turkey, title = Turkey, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turkey} }

S.FORM: Turkey Itini i 39 00 N, 35 00 E, noAsiya ato Yoropa ko Turkey. Polong no sekalay i 783,562 sq km "saka 37 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 769,632 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 13,930 sq km " Polong i 80,274,604 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 49.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 14.90%, malo no roma to a sera 35.40%. siyoto O Ankara ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 29 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 28 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: to~u~urk…ôj itini i ** ** n, ** ** …ô, no~uasija ato~u jo~uro~upa ko~u to~u~urk…ôj. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ankara ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakamo~u…ôt…ôp ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i r…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ôr…¨~…ģo~u*an, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Turkey Itini i 39 00 N, 35 00 E, noAsiya ato Yoropa ko Turkey. Polong no sekalay i 783,562 sq km "saka 37 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 769,632 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 13,930 sq km " Polong i 80,274,604 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 49.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 14.90%, malo no roma to a sera 35.40%. siyoto O Ankara ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakamoetep 29 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Recep Tayyip Erdońüan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 28 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
